name: Order-20 Dirichlet Posterior + Per-Order OBCL + Phrase Cache (3-seed)
blurb: Extended n-gram backoff to order 20 (from 15). Two-level Dirichlet-Multinomial posterior mixing with per-order OBCL concentrations and phrase suffix matching. 3-seed mean: 0.11545 (std 0.0000010). Improvement over PR #948 (order 15, 0.11556) confirmed via 1xH100 ablation.
author: Nathan Maine
